VampiresCharmPayout.ExpandingSymbolsFeatureDesc1: During any main game spin, the Expanding Symbols Feature may be randomly triggered.
VampiresCharmPayout.ExpandingSymbolsFeatureDesc2: A symbol is randomly chosen (excluding Scatter symbol) to be the special expanding symbol.
VampiresCharmPayout.ExpandingSymbolsFeatureDesc3: All of the special expanding symbols on the reels will be expanded and shifed to the leftmost reels before wins are paid.
VampiresCharmPayout.FreeSpinsFeatureDesc1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10, 15 or 20 free spins respectively.
VampiresCharmPayout.FreeSpinsFeatureDesc2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, a symbol is randomly chosen (excluding Scatter symbol) to be the special expanding symbol.
VampiresCharmPayout.FreeSpinsFeatureDesc3: During the Free Spins Feature, all of the special expanding symbols on the reels will be expanded and shifted to the leftmost reels before wins are paid.

VampiresCharmRule.Rule1: Vampire's Charm is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring expanding symbols.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 5.

VampiresCharmRule.Rule3: Scatter symbol substitutes for all symbols.
VampiresCharmRule.Rule4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

VampireCharmFeatureRule.FeatureBefore: Before the expansion of the symbols, any wins on the reels are first paid.
VampireCharmFeatureRule.FeatureAfter: After the expansion of the symbols, the wins from the randomly selected symbol are then paid.
